use_cases: Displaying validation error messages in forms and user inputs
Showing destructive action confirmations with visual warning states
Presenting informational notifications and status updates to users
Providing contextual feedback after user interactions
Replacing native browser alerts with styled notification components
ai_summary: A minimalist alert notification component system with default and destructive variants, designed for displaying contextual feedback messages in React applications. Features accessible role=alert attributes, composable AlertTitle and AlertDescription sub-components, and full TypeScript support with class-variance-authority for variant management.
